dialogue.speaker: Kenji Sato
dialogue.line: You said the data was encrypted.
dialogue.visual_cue: Kenji types furiously on a neural-link wrist.

dialogue.speaker: Rusty
dialogue.line: It's locked until you pay the tax.
dialogue.visual_cue: A flickering hologram projects a holographic coin.

scenes.action: Kenji digs through rusted server racks to retrieve a fragmented drive.

dialogue.speaker: Kenji Sato
dialogue.line: You know I'm not just an accountant.
dialogue.visual_cue: Kenji flashes the drive towards the glass window.

dialogue.speaker: Director Kato
dialogue.line: We own the air you breathe, Sato.
dialogue.visual_cue: Security drones hover in the corner.

scenes.action: Kenji confronts the CEO about illegal data mining during a corporate merger.

dialogue.speaker: Kenji Sato
dialogue.visual_cue: Kenji inserts a virus key into the mainframe.

scenes.action: Kenji hacks the city grid to broadcast the conspiracy to the public.
